children.text: For each fiscal year, the Secretary shall make payments, as provided by , to each State from its allotment under (other than any amount reserved under ) from amounts appropriated for that fiscal year.section 6503(a) of title 31section 300w–1 of this titlesection 300w–1(d) of this title
Any amount paid to a State for a fiscal year and remaining unobligated at the end of such year shall remain available for the next fiscal year to such State for the purposes for which it was made.
the fair market value of any supplies or equipment furnished the State, and

the amount of the pay, allowances, and travel expenses of any officer or employee of the Government when detailed to the State and the amount of any other costs incurred in connection with the detail of such officer or employee,
